mapper.sql: id, org_code, org_name, parent_id, ancestors, org_level, org_type, leader_id, phone, sort, status, description
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_organization_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_organization_info WHERE delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_organization_info WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_organization_info SET org_code = #{orgCode}, org_name = #{orgName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, ancestors = #{ancestors}, org_level = #{orgLevel}, org_type = #{orgType}, leader_id = #{leaderId}, phone = #{phone}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
